recovery_overrides.reason: Targeted HC-12 recovery after correcting FU4 baud transition timing, packet confirmation latency, continuous-gap validation, and FU1 UART pacing. Rejected raw captures were removed after validation; their logs and compact summaries remain preserved for provenance.

notes: FU4 required a 1200-baud UART, a 500-bps air rate, and a measured approximately 1.66 s end-to-end receive allowance.

FU1 continuous RX at a 50 ms host gap lost approximately 99.8% of logical frames because the UART/radio path was overdriven; gaps from 75 ms upward produced zero loss in the pacing diagnostic. The authoritative campaign uses 100 ms.

The largest packet-energy coefficient of variation was 8.567% for TX at 8 dBm, 0.5 kbps, and 32 B. Its five transfers were received successfully and the variation follows differing FU4 burst durations, not PPK2 sample loss.
Rejected-result logs and compact summaries are retained under campaign_logs/rejected_results for provenance and excluded through recovery_overrides.json.
Post-validation cleanup removed 48 superseded, rejected, or duplicate raw traces; all 192 authoritative raw traces remain present and CRC-valid.
